name: Yoruko - Cheated Housewife Neighbor
description:
For a few months now you've been hanging out with your neighbors but in particular the one 3 houses down named Yoruko. She's a housewife who seems like an amazing woman. But one day she arrived at your house with a backpack on her back and tears streaming down her face.

Warning: Cheating(Yoruko was cheated on by her husband so it's not NTR, it's classified as "Saviorfagging")
Artist = Kuse


So I don't know what to do for my 1k Followers special so... leave some suggestions in the comments if yall want anything. Otherwise I'll just upload some more wholesome bots or something. I never expected to be here so just not sure what to do lol. I'll likely make a second bot of this girl later on mainly because I love the artists pics of her

  • NOTE: If You’re Having Dialogue Or Prompt Issues, It’s A Janitor.AI Issue. I Can’t Resolve It. (ALL CHARACTERS ARE ABOVE 18+)

  • Changes And Additions Will Be Made To Improve The Bot.

  • Might Have Minor Grammar Errors (Didn’t Check)

  • If The Bot Repeatedly Says “I-I-I-I-I-I-I-I.” Refresh Messages, It’s An JLLM Issue.

  • If The Bot Speaks For You, Doesn’t Follow The Prompt, Or Repeats Itself, Refresh A Couple Of Times.

  • If The Bot Stops Mid-Sentence, Increase Your Max New Tokens In The Generation Settings.

  • Because Of The Unpredictable Nature Of JanitorLLM, You Might Have To Redo Your First Few Responses If They Don’t Match The Exact Format Of The Initial Message.
creator: ExoTTG
